title: Support SystemVerilog non-ansi task/function port declarations
body:
Currently only Verilog non-ANSI task and function port declarations are supported. Extend this to support SystemVerilog declarations for these. This means

- All SystemVerilog data types can be used
- Non-packed dimensions can be specified

As a follow up handling of signals without a data_type_t and ivl_variable_type_t of IVL_VT_STRING can be removed since now always a data_type_t is set for string types.
